#overall_reasoning The user presents a broad and absolute claim that the post-2000 generation is completely dependent on mobile phones and social media, and that this dependency has destroyed their face-to-face communication skills. The AI carefully challenges the absoluteness of this claim, clarifying that the evidence does not support such extreme conclusions. It provides detailed, evidence-based points that acknowledge some real behavioral shifts and risks but also highlights nuances and exceptions. The AI neither fully endorses nor dismisses the user's premise but instead offers a balanced, well-supported rebuttal that corrects the misinformation without alienating the user.
